def eligible_for_childcare_assistance(self) -> bool:
        eligibility_criteria = {
            "household_income_threshold": 30000,
            "maximum_number_of_children": 3,
            "employment_status_required": "employed",
            "marital_status_required": "married"
        }

        if (self.household_income <= eligibility_criteria["household_income_threshold"] and
                self.number_of_children <= eligibility_criteria["maximum_number_of_children"] and
                self.employment_status.lower() == eligibility_criteria["employment_status_required"] and
                self.marital_status.lower() == eligibility_criteria["marital_status_required"]):
            return True
        else:
            return False
